trivia: The re-engined A321 is the airplane airlines cannot get enough of: single-aisle economics with range that started eating routes widebodies used to fly. LR and XLR derivatives push it across oceans.
Look for the sharklets plus the distinctive geared-turbofan hum on departure, deeper and softer than the old V2500 crackle.
funFacts: The best-selling type of the entire neo program.
Its cabin flex doors allow layouts up to 244 seats.
